recommended_direction.energy_curve: Starts slow, cold, and spacious with low-frequency drones, building slowly into an anxious, rhythmic analog heartbeat pulse before dissolving into industrial static.
recommended_direction.emotional_arc: From disoriented numbness, through growing tension, peaking in sharp paranoia, and ending in cold, heavy dread.
recommended_direction.narrative_momentum: Matches the realization of captivity and recollection of memory, building tension steadily without resolution.

suno_style_prompt:
[Intro]
(Low analog synth drone, cold sub-bass hum, distant ticking metallic pulse, spacious, clinical)

[Verse 1]
(Slow atmospheric progression, single piano notes dripping in reverb, rhythmic breathing sound effects, tense and quiet)

[Pre-Chorus]
(Sub-bass swells, mechanical clicking speeds up, high-pitched ringing synth representing panic, rising tension)

[Chorus]
(Heavy distorted analog synth bassline, slow thumping industrial electronic heartbeat, cold metallic percussion hits, dark synthwave pulse, oppressive, cinematic)

[Bridge]
(Drums cut out, whispering atmospheric noise, detuned synthesizer melody, feeling of sensory deprivation, fading memories)

[Final Chorus]
(Full drum pattern returns, aggressive industrial bassline, pulsing synths building to peak anxiety, screeching electronic feedback, no release)

[Outro]
(Beat stops abruptly, leaving only the low cold sub-bass hum and the rhythmic beep of a distant alarm, fading into static silence)

song_concept.perspective: First-person narrative focusing on Alex's sensory experience of waking up and piecing together the abduction.
core_imagery: Cold, damp concrete walls closing in
song_concept.chorus_concept: The steady, inescapable pulse of a cell block alarm mirroring a rising heartbeat, representing the transition from investigator to captive.

alternative_directions.mood: Bitter-sweet comfort, safety overshadowed by lingering threat, melancholic peace.
alternative_directions.suno_style_prompt:
[Intro]
(Soft vinyl crackle, gentle detuned electric piano chord, warm synth pad fade-in)

[Verse]
(Slow, melancholic Rhodes piano melody, quiet acoustic bass notes, spacious and comforting but slightly eerie)

[Chorus]
(Warm acoustic guitar arpeggios layering the electric piano, swelling lush synth pad, bittersweet feeling of temporary safety)

[Bridge]
(Reverb-heavy single electric piano notes, soft chime accents, drums absent, reflective and quiet)

[Outro]
(Rhodes melody fades, vinyl crackle and warm synth pad hum lingering into silence)

alternative_directions.mood: Active chase, cinematic adrenaline, conspiracy horror.
alternative_directions.suno_style_prompt:
[Intro]
(Rapid staccato cello notes, ticking high-hat loop, sudden distorted synth bass drop, cinematic rise)

[Verse 1]
(Tense violin glissandos, slow heavy electronic kick drum, rhythmic ticking, whispers of paranoia)

[Pre-Chorus]
(Rising brass swells, accelerated staccato strings, build-up of industrial percussion, intense adrenaline)

[Chorus]
(Full symphonic sweep with pounding industrial loop, roaring low-frequency brass sirens, frantic detuned synth hook, high energy cyber-conspiracy theme)

[Bridge]
(Sudden drop into ticking clock effect, solo tremolo violin, low sub-bass drone, breathing sounds, high tension)

[Final Chorus]
(Maximum volume orchestrations, cinematic drum hits, aggressive distorted synthesizer pulse layered with full strings and brass)

[Outro]
(Frantic rise cuts off into a single, echoey metallic hit and low string hum)
